industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Sunflower Sustainable Investments Ltd
summary: Sunflower Sustainable Investments Ltd operates in the renewable energy sector. It holds a portfolio of PV plants in Israel, Spain, and Italy; and holds and constructs wind farms in Poland and Finland. The company has a portfolio of approximately 81 MW power projects. Sunflower Sustainable Investments Ltd was founded in 1995 and is based in Givatayim, Israel.
